description: A paginated collection of problem comments.
name: CommentCollection

nextPageKey.description: Cursor for the next page of results.

comments.description: The list of comments on this page.

items.description: A single comment attached to a problem.

id.description: The unique identifier of the comment.

createdAtTimestamp.description: The Unix timestamp in milliseconds when the comment was created.

authorName.description: The display name of the user who created the comment.

content.description: The text content of the comment.

context.description: Optional context reference attached to the comment.
